After viewing the upper levels, the camera tilts down to focus on the wooden entrance base where a small cat sits, ending with a close approach to the detailed wooden architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded temple approach into the open heart of a traditional Japanese courtyard. It begins along a gravel path flanked by high earthen walls and green trees, moving steadily toward a traditional gate with a five-story pagoda rising above it against a bright blue sky. As the camera passes through the dark wooden structure of the gate, the scene opens into a sunlit courtyard featuring raked gravel gardens and auxiliary temple buildings. The camera then advances along a stone tile path until it reaches the base of the pagoda, tilting upward to reveal the full five-tier structure silhouetted against distant mountains. Finally, the view tilts back down to focus on a small cat resting at the wooden entrance before closing in on the detailed architecture of the base.
